raw: {"perspective": "Security Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/Layout.jsx", "issue": "EnergyMode context does not enforce RLS-bound profile data. Unauthenticated users can bypass mode restrictions by manipulating client state.", "recommended_fix": "Move EnergyLevel validation to Supabase RLS policy on profiles table. Authenticate context via middleware, not client state."}, {"severity": "medium", "file_or_area": "apps/web/src/components/assessment/energy-picker.tsx", "issue": "EnergyLevel input lacks server-side validation. Possible for malicious client to spoof 'Low' mode to bypass engagement tracking.", "recommended_fix": "Validate and log EnergyLevel changes in edge function, tie to session hash."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Energy Adaptation logic is client-trusted — violates Constitution Law 0: System Integrity."}

findings.issue: EnergyMode context does not enforce RLS-bound profile data. Unauthenticated users can bypass mode restrictions by manipulating client state.
findings.recommended_fix: Move EnergyLevel validation to Supabase RLS policy on profiles table. Authenticate context via middleware, not client state.

findings.issue: EnergyLevel input lacks server-side validation. Possible for malicious client to spoof 'Low' mode to bypass engagement tracking.
findings.recommended_fix: Validate and log EnergyLevel changes in edge function, tie to session hash.

whistleblower_flag: Energy Adaptation logic is client-trusted — violates Constitution Law 0: System Integrity.
